description: Control if and what values are exported from zones to a VTK file. The values exported by default are stresses , groups , and displacements .

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.description: Controls if and what values are exported from zones to a VTK file. The values being exported by default are stresses, groups, and displacements.

keywords.name: displacements
keywords.description: displacement vectors at gridpoints

keywords.name: zone-extra
keywords.description: extra variables with index i at zones

keywords.name: gridpoint-extra
keywords.description: extra variables with index i at gridpoints

keywords.name: forces
keywords.description: unbalanced force information at gridpoints, including the last local force ratio.

keywords.name: groups
keywords.description: include group assignments to zones in the slot s in the vtk file

keywords.name: model-fluid
keywords.description: include the fluid property s in the vtk file

keywords.name: model-mechanical
keywords.description: include the mechanical property s in the vtk file

keywords.name: model-thermal
keywords.description: include the thermal property s in the vtk file

keywords.name: pore-pressure
keywords.description: pore pressure values at gridpoints

keywords.name: range
keywords.description: Specifies a range used to filter which zones are included in a vtk file export.

keywords.name: saturation
keywords.description: saturation values at gridpoints

keywords.name: stresses
keywords.description: average stresses in each zone. Note that the internal tetra stresses are never exported.

keywords.name: temperatures
keywords.description: temperature values at gridpoints

keywords.name: velocities
keywords.description: velocity vectors at gridpoints

keywords.name: filename
keywords.description: specify the name of the vtk file
